title: About
text:
I am a graduate student at Boston University pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics.
I have professional experience in data analytics and audit through my role at Citigroup, where I support reporting, regulatory requirements, and business insights.
My background combines business knowledge with data skills, allowing me to translate data into actionable insights.



Boston University
Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics
University at Albany
Bachelor of Science in Business Administration
Minor in Chinese and Economics

title: Home
text:
I am currently a Data Analytics Senior Analyst at Citigroup, with experience in data reporting, audit processes, and business analytics.
I am pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University, building advanced skills in data analysis, visualization, and decision-making.





Analyze large datasets to support business and regulatory reporting
Build dashboards using Tableau and PowerBI
Support audit processes and data-driven decision making






Data Analytics & Visualization

Business Intelligence

Risk & Audit Analytics
